narrative_summary: The joke highlights the comical 12-fold collapse in GPT-5.6's benchmark performance the moment a harder test arrives, illustrating that AI progress is just perpetual benchmark whack-a-mole.
rationale: Candidates 1, 2, 4, and 5 tie on score, but Candidate 1's deadpan voice is the best tonal match for the buff-doge/cheems template — the flat, no-frills delivery lets the raw numbers do the comedic heavy lifting without over-explaining. Candidate 3 loses a specificity point for incorrectly citing ARC-AGI-1 instead of ARC-AGI-2, making it the weakest of the group.
hat_pair: foam toaster hat with two slices of toast permanently popping up
foam graduation cap with a tiny diploma scroll taped to the top
